titles.title: I Was Made To Praise You

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I was made to praise You I was made to glorify Your name In every circumstance to find A chance to thank You

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I was made to love You I was made to worship at Your feet And to obey You, Lord I was made for You

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I was made to praise You I was made to glorify Your name In every circumstance to find A chance to thank You

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I was made to love You I was made to worship at Your feet And to obey You Lord I was made for You

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: I will always praise You I will always glorify Your name In every circumstance I'll find A chance to thank You

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: I will always love You I will always worship at Your feet And I'll obey You Lord I was made for You I was made for You
